	Nest monorepo manually configured with npm workspaces and several Nest microservice applications (`auth-service`, `loyalty-service`, `notification-service`, `customer-service`).

	Added microservice skeletons with TCP transports, shared DTOs in libs/shared.

	No extensions needed.

- [x] Compile the Project
	Dependencies installed and no errors.

	Not required for this workspace.

- [x] Launch the Project
